title: In the logic of development
text: The strongest family couples are united by a common goal: the birth and upbringing of children, mortgage or repair, climbing together, any big task is achieved faster; the rule works nationwide: the State and business here combine efforts, resources and expertise to carry out national projects, notes the Doctor of Economic Sciences, Professor of Logistics of the Finance University under the Government of the Russian Federation, Nadia Capustin. The development of education and health, energy and transport, public infrastructure and agriculture, science and the economy, and the resolution of the challenges of technological leadership are national projects. This is a detailed plan of action: the growth of the economy in the country affects the quality of life of each of us.

title: In the logic of development
text: Of course, given the size of the national projects, it is not possible to achieve this amount of change from the budget alone, but private investment is necessary. At the meeting of the Presidential Council for Strategic Development and National Projects, this theme was particularly important. Business in our country creates the conditions for growth — both through large-scale government programmes and through support measures for development organizations — the WEBA and the relevant institutions in its perimeter. As the Council noted at its meeting, the Head of WEBA Igor Shuvalov, the PEI system of evaluation (complex performance indicators) of development organizations, with a focus on national projects, will be cross-cutting, and it is important that all existing development organizations at the regional level will now be included in this work.

title: In the logic of development
text: The extension of the model of support for business initiatives by development organizations in the WEBA perimeter (two dozen organizations, such as the SME Corporation, the Russian Export Centre or the Skolkovo) to the level of regional development institutions is a major step towards the creation of a single economic space. The importance of such harmonization lies in the creation of a universal language of interaction between the business and the State.

title: In the logic of development
text: Government development institutions take on the role of long-term partners of an entrepreneur across the way, from the idea of industrial production to work in a small city to export. For the business community, the new approach significantly increases growth opportunities. A simple example is that an entrepreneur who successfully burns coffee (chewing clothes/pharmacist network) in one city expects to start in another. Until recently, this has required significant costs — a comprehensive assessment of prospects, a search for potential creditors and partners, a stand-alone selection of space and rent, and a provision of support to the new propiska.

title: In the logic of development

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: Photo by Nikolai Oberemchenko: The budget of any State is of crucial interest in assessing and defining the main directions of State policy in the foreseeable future, and these priorities are not of a declarative nature but are confirmed by specific expenditure items and monetary amounts expressed in national currency in the form of a law on the main areas of society; this is why the Russian Government ' s recent bill on the federal budget for the fiscal year 2026 and the two following years is of clear interest to Parliament.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: The most important priority of the draft federal budget for the period 2026-2028 is the fulfilment of social obligations towards citizens, the financial provision of the country ' s defence and security needs, the social support of the families participating in the SVF, the attainment of the national goals up to 2030 set by the President of the Russian Federation, and national projects are one of the main instruments of the Russian budget ' s expenditure policy, with over 41 trillion roubles allocated to the activities of the National Projects over the next six years, almost equal to all the federal budget ' s annual expenditure in recent times and 2.6 times more than in the previous six years.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: The Russian Government ' s draft federal budget for the period 2026-2028 is balanced and sustainable, particularly in order to maintain the macroeconomic stability of the national economy as a whole and to ensure its high-quality economic growth, taking into account the world ' s challenges and risks; the draft budget provides for the unconditional fulfilment of all the social commitments made by the State to citizens, in accordance with the law; moreover, the budget bill provides for the conditions for the growth of real wages and incomes of the population in the next year and for the future; the most important budget is measures to improve the demographic situation in our country, i.e. the increase in the birth rate and the life expectancy of Russians.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: The State programme for the support and development of families with children, or the "child budget", will exceed 10 trillion roubles by three years, and will provide, as from 2026, an annual reimbursement of a portion of the income tax paid to needy families with two or more children; the maternal capital programme will continue to be implemented until 2030, with inflation indexation and an opportunity for families with children to obtain maternal capital balances without defining the purpose of their use; the total amount for this purpose will be more than 1.8 trillion roubles in three years.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: More than 2 trillion roubles from the federal budget are allocated to programmes to improve housing for families with children by subsidizing the mortgage interest rate for all families with children (about 1.8 trillion rubles), as well as lump-sum payments (450,000 rubles) to large families (with three or more children) to partially cover mortgages (more than 300 billion rubles); raising the standard VAT rate by 2 percentage points (from 20 per cent to 22 per cent) from 2026 will not affect socially significant goods; this type of product (food, medicines, children ' s goods, etc.) will continue to receive a discount rate of 10 per cent; in the medium term, the Government will devote additional resources to the development of health care in Russia in the amount of more than 1 trillion roubles.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: More than 900 billion roubles have been allocated for the implementation of the national project "Long-term and active life" in the three-year period. The budget provides full funding for the provision of medicines, including assistance to children with severe, rare diseases, prevention of cardiovascular diseases, provision of medicines under a special targeted programme; the national project "The Family" will provide funds for the development of children's health facilities: infrastructure for perinatal centres, children's hospitals and maternity hospitals; over 94 billion roubles will be provided for this in the next three years; in the area of education, in particular, the modernization and construction of schools and kindergartens will continue; and nearly 110 billion roubles will be used to finance the construction of 150 Russian schools by 2030.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: More than 290 billion roubles will be allocated to finance the major rehabilitation of schools in 2026-2028. In order to establish a modern kindergarten infrastructure in 2026-2028, 50.9 billion roubles will be earmarked for rehabilitation only and an additional 26.6 billion roubles will be allocated for the construction of new institutions. In three years, more than 60.0 billion roubles will be allocated for the repair of technical facilities. Nearly 170 billion roubles will be allocated for the creation of world-class campuses. 25 campuses will be built by 2030 and at least 40 campuses by 2036. Some 800 hostels of universities are planned for major renovation until 2030. More than 70 billion roubles will be allocated for this purpose in the period up to 2028. One of the most important social policy vectors is the support and assistance to families participating in the CSS.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: The resources planned in the budget will ensure the fulfilment of all the commitments made by the State in this area; the implementation of social policy measures will affect the area of assistance to the Russian regions; here, the purpose of the transfers from the 2026 federal budget is to implement measures aimed at maintaining the budgetary sustainability of regional budgets, promoting socially oriented infrastructure development and ensuring the effective participation of the regions in the realization of the national objectives of federal development.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: In order to stimulate socio-economic development and provide financial support to the regions, the draft budget provides for an increase in the overall level of assistance to the regions, including grants for the equalization of budgetary security and wage subsidies for the year 2026 at a rate no lower than the projected inflation rate and a reduction in regional disparities in the level of budgetary security, and will continue to implement individual development programmes for regions with low levels of socio-economic development aimed at increasing their economic potential in order to reduce regional disparities in socio-economic development.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: The national project "Infrastructure for Life" will extend the programme of budgetary credit to the regions for social infrastructure development until 2030 and will develop and use a new and effective financial instrument of the Federal Treasury such as treasury infrastructure credit, including for the completion by the regions of their socially significant infrastructure projects. 150 billion roubles per year will be allocated to the regions by 2030; a total of 1 trillion roubles will be allocated for this purpose between 2025 and 2030.

title: Priority of the federal budget for 2026: sustainable development and record support for social policy
text: Thus, one of the most important areas of the State economic strategy for the next three years remains social policy, both in terms of expenditure and income of the Russian Federation ' s federal budget.

title: An investigation in 200 years, Araccheev, Minkina, and the Decabrist uprising.
text: The painting of Vasilia Perova, "The Resurrection of the Decabreists", 1825, is a landmark year in Russian history, in which a change of monarchs and a fateful rebellion of the Decabrists took place in the country. And it is now 200 years since those events took place. We begin with a brief timeline. On 19 November 1825, in the city of Taganrog, in the 48th year of life after a brief illness, Emperor Alexander I died suddenly. Under the Act of Throne Heritage, approved by Emperor Paul I in 1797, in the event of the death of his son Alexander, in the absence of male heirs, the right to the throne was to be transferred to Paul's second son, Constantin.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: Gitana Arkadievna quietly left early January morning Photo: Anastasia PLECHAKOVA. Going to the photo bank of KP on 5 February, it became known that Gitana Leontenco had died. I saw her (the first and last time) 40 years ago, early 1986. I just got into a popular youth newspaper and I and my friend (who actually recommended me) were making material dedicated to a date. In fact, these were notes about a gypsy subculture. Among other things, we were recording interviews with a Roma singer, Valentina Ponomareva, who had the first solo album.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: My girlfriend was talking to Valentina Dmitryna (although the interview was published under my last name), and I was just recording a conversation with Gitana Arkadievna, a famous grotesque rider. I, the starting reporter of the Komsomol edition, almost felt that our visa was old (but, a quarter of a century older, pre-retirement age – women retired in the USSR) But both of them were undoubtedly attractive. "Content", temperament + charisma, the same "congratulation of older" that the present public world is almost lost. Leontenco, laughing, told us a not-so-funny story, that when she was buried with her future husband, her family threatened to kill both her and her loved one.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: And I didn't know that Alexei Batalova was talking to me, even though the interviewer was talking to me about the presumption that the interviewer was aware (then the film "The New Marriages Zontic", one of the last acting works by Alexei Vladimirovich). By the way, her story at the time was a pure story for the film, and very Roma: love as a challenge to the Tabor, a risk not only to feelings, but also to life. No gossip in real time, endless "insides" is just a personal confession that is perceived as a unique destiny, not as another information link about "the rock of an actor with a horse." And I also pointed out that Gitana was sort of distancing herself from her gypsy background.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: I remember that Leontenco said that her mother was a Spanish woman, but she read her memories relatively recently, where she said, "In the circus, there were rumors that my father wasn't Leontenco, but that some Italian man who was in the camps... My mother, who was also called Gitana, was an amazing person. Everything before she was in the circus, she remembered vaguely and didn't like to talk about it. It looks like she got into a gypsy family on the border with Moldova. I think it's connected to a revolution when families were separated, children were lost. If you look closely at her, you can see that she's probably Italian or French.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: By the time she was 18 years old, my mother had become a star of manesa. For her incredible appearance — isina-black hair, huge eyes, a fine figure — she had received a beautiful pseudonym of the Night. Working in the circus, she married an air gymnast, Arkadia Leontenco, and took his name. My mother was afraid of her past, never told me who she was from. Maybe it was linked to noble roots. Then in the circus, there were a lot of people hiding in the circus whose bloodline could attract the attention of organs." Every myth had a prologue, and in a decent Russian biography, it was always designed so that nothing could be checked. In the case of Gitana, everything is perfect: everything begins with the mother, who is called the same name as the daughter, as if a man was repeated as a manger.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: It's a very cinematic line of fate, almost ready script: a woman who outwards all the stampes about "Gypsy" -- the sysina black hair, the huge eyes, the manage -- and she spends her whole life away from the gypsy identity as from the brand. The feeling that young Gitana has "dropped away" from the gypsy makes a great connection with her own words about her mother: a vague past, "some Italian" instead of her father, "faster French" instead of a clear line of descent, a child who "has entered the Gypsy family" and then ended up in the circus, so that the gypsy in this biography is not like pride, but as a shelter, a temporary refuge after a disaster (revolution, family disintegration), which gives a profession and a staged pseudonym, but does not give a safe origin.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
text: The phrase "Mom was afraid of her past" and the hypothesis of noble roots is very Soviet: in the 30th to 50th, any unstandard biography is a cause for fear. The circus as a refuge for "ex-peoples" — former nobles, "nationally doubtful", children without documents — is a whole layer of clandestine social history of the USSR, and it is understandable why Gitana's already grown-up "corrected" her origin: in a formal culture, the image of "Gypsies" was desirable only as a folk number, and the real Roma origin is both a stigma and a potential vulnerability.

title: Gitana Leontenco and Alexei Batalov: Love is when once lost, they keep looking until they find it again.
